exportFormats.name: Import Paper
exportFormats.outputPathTemplate: 02-Papers/{% if creators | length == 1 %}{{creators[0].lastName}}{% elif creators | length == 2 %}{{creators[0].lastName}} & {{creators[1].lastName}}{% else %}{{creators[0].lastName}} et al.{% endif %} ({{date | format("YYYY")}}) - {{title | truncate(50, true, "") | replace(":", " -") | replace("/", "-") | replace("\\", "-") | replace("?", "")}}.md
